summary_en: 40,000 shares acquired for ¥66.0M (¥1,650/share average) via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-26. Represents 88.9% of authorized limit (45,000 shares; ¥74.25M upper bound). Program concluded.
title_en: Notice Regarding Results of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Floor Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3) and Completion of Acquisition
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-26, OKUMURA ENGINEERING completed acquisition of 40,000 treasury shares via off-floor purchase (ToSTNeT-3) at an average price of ¥1,650/share, totaling ¥66.0M. This represents 88.9% of the authorized limit approved by the board on 2026-05-25 (45,000 shares, ¥74.25M upper bound). The acquisition has been concluded. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and implement flexible capital allocation policy.
